title: RPGTools
description: A plugin that allows for leveling up your tools and weapons
body:
# ⚔️ Level Up Your Tools & Weapons  

**RPGTools** is a lightweight leveling system for tools and weapons that rewards usage with **XP, levels, and enchantments**—while staying true to the vanilla Minecraft experience.  

---

## 📋 Requirements  
- A permissions plugin (e.g., [LuckPerms](https://luckperms.net/)) is required if using the built-in permission `rpgtools.admin` for commands.  

---

### ✨ **Features**  
- **⚔️ Progressive Gear Leveling**  
  Tools and weapons grow stronger with use, unlocking new power as you play.  
- **🔮 Customizable Enchantments**  
  Assign unique enchantments per level via a simple, user-friendly config.  
- **📈 XP Multiplier Control**  
  Adjust how fast players progress with customizable XP rates.  
- **👹 Mob-Specific XP Drops**  
  Fine-tune XP rewards for each mob type.  
- **⛏️ Block-Based XP Rewards**  
  Set custom XP values for each block type to reward mining your way.  
- **🐺 Wolf Combat XP**  
  Wolves grant XP to weapons when helping you fight mobs.  
- **📊 Flexible Leveling Formula**  
  Choose between exponential or linear XP curves to match your server’s pace.  
- **🛠️ Admin Commands**  
  Instantly grant XP, levels, or reload the config with ease.
- **🎯 Real-Time ActionBar Updates**  
  Progress tracking with customizable XP/level alerts in the ActionBar.
- **🌈 Customizable Lore Colors**  
Personalize gear lore with configurable color codes for rarities and effects.
---




## 🛠️ **Supported Items**  
| Tools         | Weapons        |
|--------------|----------------|
| Pickaxe      | Sword          |
| Shovel       | Trident        |
| Axe          | Bow            |
| Hoe          | Crossbow       |
|              | Mace           |

---

## 🔐 Permissions  
- `rpgtools.admin`  
  Grants access to admin commands (`givexp`, `levelup`, `reload`).
- `rpgtools.premium`  
  Grants another multiplier to users or ranks with this permission
  
  
---

## ❓ Support  
For help with the plugin, join our **[Discord](https://discord.gg/FxFbNBQB)**!
